  snapToInterval with SCREEN_WIDTH snap), add centering to EmptyHero

  teams from duplicate player records, fix legacyChildren dedup to use name
- ISSUE 5: Family Quick View — always mount FamilyPanel (not just multi-child),
  add "Family View" button in athlete section header

commit.message:
Fix mobile Safari margins without breaking desktop layout

The real fix: dynamically set document.documentElement.style.background
via JavaScript based on the current page and device width.

- Mobile login/splash: html background = orange gradient
  (matches overscroll bounce color on Safari)
- Mobile app pages: html background = cream (#FDFAEC)
- Desktop (768px+): html background = navy (#0D3B66) always

This prevents Safari's rubber-band overscroll from revealing
a mismatched background color at the edges, while keeping
the navy phone frame effect on desktop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: add @file suffix to serversTransport reference

Traefik v3 requires the @file suffix when referencing a serversTransport
defined in a file provider. Without it, the transport config (300s
responseHeaderTimeout) was silently ignored, causing 502 on long requests.

Improve context blocks home with hierarchical tree view (#688)

* Improve context blocks home with hierarchical tree view

* fix context tree expand behavior and desktop scroll

* Refine context block tree UI per feedback

- Remove 'Block hierarchy' header section for cleaner appearance
- Start with all parent nodes collapsed by default
- Replace [+]/[-] text markers with arrow icons (► collapsed, ▼ expanded)
- Remove '-' marker for leaf nodes, relying on indentation alone
- Update layout from grid to flexbox for simpler row structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix async data loading for collapsed state in ContextBlockTree

The collapsedIds state was initialized with an empty tree on first render,
but wasn't updated when blocks loaded asynchronously. This caused all parent
nodes to render expanded even though the intent was to start collapsed.

Added useEffect with hasInitializedRef flag to update collapsedIds when
the tree first populates with data, ensuring all parent nodes start
collapsed regardless of async data loading timing while preserving user
toggles after initialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix alignment issue in context block tree

Added invisible spacer element for leaf nodes to match the width of
toggle buttons on parent nodes. This ensures all content (titles, meta)
aligns vertically at the same horizontal position regardless of whether
a node has children or not.

- Added .context-tree__spacer CSS class (28px width)
- Updated TreeBranch to render spacer for leaf nodes
- Preserves clean visual hierarchy with indentation alone for leaves

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Android platform generation step to Codemagic build

Android platform files are not committed to the repo, so Codemagic
had no gradlew to run. Add a 'Generate Android platform' step that
runs `flutter create --platforms=android --org com.tendimensions .`
after pub get to produce the full v2-embedding Android project on
the build machine before the APK step runs.

Also correct ANDROID_PACKAGE_NAME to com.tendimensions.book_collection_scanner
(Flutter derives it from the pubspec project name with underscores).

Fix widget_test.dart: replace default MyApp counter test with a
smoke test for the actual BookScannerApp entry point.

commit.message:
fix: replace regex HTML sanitization with DOMParser in Canvas

CodeQL flagged 4 issues (3x incomplete multi-character sanitization,
1x bad HTML filtering regexp). Regex-based sanitization is inherently
bypassable via nesting and encoding tricks.

Now uses DOMParser to properly walk the DOM tree and remove dangerous
elements (script, iframe, object, etc.) and attributes (on* handlers,
javascript: URIs). The sandbox="" iframe remains as defense-in-depth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: ghost text baseline — remove lineHeight:1, anchor top with paddingTop

lineHeight:1 shrinks the ghost line box vs the input's natural line-height,
shifting the baseline. Removing it lets both share the same line metrics.

commit.message:
feat: delta snapshots PRs 2-3 (diff logic, delta log, broadcast) (#129)

* feat: add DeltaSource IndexMap diff function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: compute provider data deltas via IndexMap diff

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: compute work item deltas

Add diff_work_items() that converts Vec<WorkItem> to IndexMap keyed by
WorkItemIdentity and diffs. Derive PartialEq on WorkItem and CheckoutRef
to enable value comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: apply provider data deltas to materialized state

Add apply_changes() that mutates ProviderData in place from a Vec<Change>.
Roundtrip tests verify diff(prev, curr) + apply == curr for all collection
types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add delta log to RepoState and compute deltas on broadcast

Add DeltaEntry type to protocol. RepoState now tracks last broadcast
providers, work items, and health for diffing. Deltas are computed and
logged in both poll_snapshots and broadcast_snapshot, but full snapshots
are still emitted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: switch broadcast to SnapshotFull/SnapshotDelta events

Replace DaemonEvent::Snapshot with SnapshotFull and SnapshotDelta
variants. Daemon chooses delta when serialized size is smaller than
full snapshot. TUI handles both: SnapshotFull applies as before,
SnapshotDelta applies provider data changes incrementally then
re-correlates work items.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: verify socket server forwards SnapshotDelta events

Add SnapshotDelta wire roundtrip test in protocol. Update socket
roundtrip test to accept both SnapshotFull and SnapshotDelta. Derive
PartialEq on ProviderError. Format fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review feedback on delta snapshots PR

- Fix bug: missing seq increment in broadcast_snapshot
- Fix bug: broadcast_snapshot built snapshot with stale seq
- Remove dead code: diff_work_items results were computed but never consumed
- Use shift_remove instead of swap_remove to preserve IndexMap order
- Extract selection restoration into RepoUiState::update_table_view helper

* chore: fix stale doc comment, add intent comment on diff_work_items

commit.message:
Phase 9c: observability and ops improvements

Web router logging:
- All 4 routers now have logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
- Key events logged: route hits, 404s, session log submits/idempotent
  returns, exercise logs, program activate/complete/abandon, max updates

Config key warnings:
- Settings.__post_init__ logs WARNING if OPENAI_API_KEY or
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is empty so missing-key errors surface at startup
  rather than deep in the call stack

Job timestamps:
- jobs.py stores started_at, completed_at, duration_seconds in job dict
- Logged on submit, generation start, and success/failure
- generate_result.html shows duration on completion ("in 312.4s")

Settings singleton:
- deps.py caches Settings in module-level _settings; get_settings()
  initialises once rather than re-parsing .env on every request
- get_db() calls get_settings() instead of Settings() directly

commit.message:
Add knowledge management system with vault structure and housekeeping scheduler

Defines vault folder conventions (daily/, notes/, people/, projects/, weekly/,
monthly/, yearly/ with archive/ subfolders), note type templates with namespaced
tag taxonomy (type/*, topic/*, status/*), and create/append/link decision rules.

Adds a housekeeping scheduler that runs weekly, monthly, and yearly review tasks
via Claude, archiving old notes and carrying forward open tasks. Includes a
/weekly-review skill for manual triggers.

use PORT env var.

commit.message:
Update git submodules

* Update ironic from branch 'master'
  to 02eca0fc90b4c2a353555bdb8760ba926adc39f5
  - Merge "Refactor switchport config parsing into SwitchPortConfig dataclass"
  - Refactor switchport config parsing into SwitchPortConfig dataclass
    
    This addresses a deferred code review comment to refactor the parsing
    of the network config data.
    
    Extract the inline parsing of the network configuration string format
    ({access|trunk|hybrid}/native_vlan=N[/allowed_vlans=V1,V2,Vn-Vm,...])
    into a dedicated SwitchPortConfig frozen dataclass with from_string()
    and from_switchport() class methods. This replaces the ad-hoc string
    splitting and 3-tuple (mode, native_vlan, allowed_vlans) that was
    passed throughout ironic_networking.py.
    
    Key changes:
    - New ironic/drivers/modules/network/switchport_config.py with the
      SwitchPortConfig dataclass
    - Renamed _get_network_mode_and_vlan() to _get_switch_port_config(),
      now returns SwitchPortConfig or None
    - _resolve_network_configuration() returns SwitchPortConfig or None
    - All callsites updated to use SwitchPortConfig attributes
    - from_string() validates mode against VALID_MODES and supports
      allowed_vlans with VLAN ranges (e.g., "1,2,4-7")
    - from_switchport() validates mode and native_vlan types
    - Comprehensive unit tests in test_switchport_config.py
    
    Related-Bug: 2113769
    Assisted-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
    Change-Id: I11b9b9949d8d1c516905480964d17cb970cc6960
    Signed-off-by: Allain Legacy <alegacy@redhat.com>

commit.message:
feat(prism-s8): position constraint via CMDP Lagrangian Dual

Adds adaptive λ × position² penalty to combat bang-bang policy.
- PositionConstraintController: dual gradient ascent on E[|pos|] ≤ 0.5
- λ auto-calibrates (rises when mean|pos| > target, falls when below)
- Warmup 50K steps, λ_max=5.0, dual_lr=1e-3, update every 100 steps
- Replaces failed S7 (Mean-Variance CMDP) which had indirect signal

Ref: Seyde NeurIPS 2021, Haarnoja 2018 (SAC dual), Stooke ICML 2020

commit.message:
Fix admin nav broken by music-reviewPane ID mismatch

showAdminSection built pane IDs as s + 'Pane', so 'music-review'
produced 'music-reviewPane' but the element was named 'musicReviewPane'.
The null dereference crashed the forEach loop, breaking ALL nav buttons.

Fix: rename id to 'music-reviewPane' to match the key, and add a null-guard
on the pane lookup so a future mismatch degrades gracefully instead of
freezing navigation entirely.
